allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/data/generated-courses.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Total courses:', d.length\); const subjects={}; d.forEach\(c=>{subjects[c.subject]=subjects[c.subject]||[]; subjects[c.subject].push\(c.code\)}\); Object.keys\(subjects\).sort\(\).forEach\(s=>console.log\(s+':', subjects[s].length\)\)")
